name: Hip Flexor Stretch
description: Kneeling lunge, drive hips forward and squeeze glute

name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
description: Both legs at 90 degrees, lean into front shin

name: 90/90 Hip Switch
description: Rotate between 90/90 positions side to side

name: Pigeon Pose
description: Front shin parallel to mat, fold forward over leg

name: Deep Squat Hold
description: Full depth squat hold, elbows pushing knees out

name: Cossack Squat
description: Side-to-side deep lunge, keep grounded heel flat

name: Hip Circle
description: Standing, large circular motion of hip joint

name: Fire Hydrant
description: All-fours, raise knee out to the side keeping 90 degrees

name: Frog Stretch
description: Knees wide, rock back and forward slowly

name: Dynamic Hip Flexor
description: Lunge position, oscillate forward and back

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
description: Hinge at hips, keep spine neutral

name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
description: Seated, extend leg, reach toward foot

name: Lying Hamstring Stretch
description: On back, pull leg toward chest with strap or hands

name: RDL Stretch
description: Single-leg hinge, feel hamstring load eccentrically

name: Good Morning Stretch
description: Hands behind head, hinge with soft knees

name: Nordic Walk Stretch
description: Walk with straight legs, alternate reaching to opposite foot

name: Dowel RDL
description: Dowel along spine to ensure neutral back during hinge

name: PNF Hamstring
description: Contract hamstring 10s then relax and deepen stretch

name: Standing Quad Stretch
description: Pull heel to glute, keep knees together

name: Couch Stretch
description: Rear foot elevated on wall or couch, drive hip forward

name: Rectus Femoris Stretch
description: Kneeling, pull rear foot to glute to isolate RF

name: Prone Quad Stretch
description: Face down, pull heel toward glute

name: Walking Lunge Stretch
description: Long stride lunge, feel quad/hip flexor stretch

name: Wall Calf Stretch
description: Heel on ground, push wall, straight leg for gastrocnemius

name: Soleus Stretch
description: Bent knee version of calf stretch to target soleus

name: Ankle Circle
description: Slow controlled ankle circles each direction

name: Ankle Dorsiflexion Drill
description: Knee-over-toe stretch against wall, improve dorsiflexion

name: Foot Roll
description: Roll tennis ball or massage ball under the foot arch

name: Toe Spread & Splay
description: Spread toes apart as wide as possible, then curl

name: Cat-Cow
description: All-fours, alternate between arching and rounding spine

name: Thoracic Rotation
description: Seated or 90/90, rotate upper back with arm reaching up

name: Foam Roll Thoracic
description: Roll upper back segment by segment, pause on tight spots

name: Thoracic Extension Over Foam Roll
description: Extend backward over foam roller placed at mid-back

name: Open Book
description: Side-lying, rotate top arm open like opening a book

name: Thread the Needle
description: All-fours, thread one arm under body and rotate

name: Sphinx Pose
description: Prone, prop on forearms, chest lifted, breathe into front

name: Seated Spinal Twist
description: Seated cross-legged, twist and place hand behind for leverage

name: Chest Opener
description: Hands clasped behind back, squeeze shoulder blades, lift chest

name: Doorway Stretch
description: Elbow at 90 degrees in door frame, lean through gently

name: Cross-Body Shoulder Stretch
description: Pull arm across body at shoulder height

name: Shoulder Circle
description: Large slow arm circles forward and backward

name: Wall Slide
description: Back against wall, slide arms up overhead, maintain contact

name: Sleeper Stretch
description: Side-lying, internally rotate shoulder pressing wrist toward mat

name: Pec Stretch on Foam Roller
description: Lie lengthwise on roller, arms spread wide at shoulder height

name: Band Pull Apart
description: Band at chest height, pull apart to full extension

name: Overhead Reach Stretch
description: Reach one arm overhead and bend to opposite side

name: Neck Side Tilt
description: Ear toward shoulder, gentle hand pressure for assist

name: Neck Rotation
description: Slow chin-to-shoulder rotation each side

name: Levator Scapulae Stretch
description: Look down at 45 degrees, gentle pull on back of head

name: Chin Tuck
description: Retract chin straight back, hold briefly, release

name: Neck Flexion & Extension
description: Slow controlled nod forward and back

name: Wrist Circle
description: Full controlled circles in both directions

name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
description: Arm extended, palm up, pull fingers back gently

name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
description: Arm extended, palm down, pull fingers toward you

name: Prayer Stretch
description: Palms together at chest, press down to stretch wrists

name: Forearm Foam Roll
description: Roll from wrist to elbow on both sides of forearm

name: Figure-4 Stretch
description: Lying, cross ankle over knee, pull thigh toward chest

name: Seated Figure-4
description: Seated in chair, ankle over knee, lean forward

name: Glute Foam Roll
description: Sit on roller, cross leg, tilt to target side

name: Glute Bridge Hold
description: Top of bridge position, actively squeeze glutes

name: Clamshell
description: Side-lying, knees bent, open top knee like a clamshell

name: Child's Pose
description: Knees wide or together, arms reaching forward, breathe into back

name: Knee to Chest
description: Lying on back, pull knee toward chest

name: Double Knee to Chest
description: Both knees pulled toward chest, rock gently

name: Supine Spinal Twist
description: On back, drop bent knee across body, arms wide

name: Lower Back Foam Roll
description: Roll from mid-back to sacrum, avoid lumbar pressure

name: Pelvic Tilt
description: Lying, alternate arching and flattening lower back to floor

name: World's Greatest Stretch
description: Lunge + thoracic rotation + hamstring reach sequence

name: Sun Salutation
description: Full-body flow: standing, fold, plank, cobra, downdog

name: Inchworm
description: Walk hands out to plank, walk feet to hands, repeat

name: Bear Crawl
description: All-fours crawl pattern, knees hovering off floor

name: Hip & Spine Flow
description: Continuous hip circle into spinal wave movement

name: Turkish Get-Up (Slow)
description: Full get-up with pause at each transition point
